segments.visualDescription: A heartwarming 2D anime illustration showing a young woman finding peace after a long day. She is sitting comfortably in a soft, plush armchair by a large window. Outside, the evening sky transitions from a soft orange to a calm purple hue. She holds an open, well-loved book in her hands, her eyes gently focused on the pages, a subtle, peaceful smile on her face. A small, steaming cup of herbal tea rests on a side table next to her, casting a soft glow from a nearby small lamp. The overall atmosphere is warm, quiet, and inviting, emphasizing tranquility and mental escape. Clean line art and rich, soft lighting details.
segments.dialogueOrNarration: After a very long and busy day, Sarah felt so tired. Her mind was full of many tasks, and she needed to rest. She walked to her favorite chair by the window. [softly] The room was quiet and warm. Sarah picked up her special book. Its cover felt smooth in her hands. She opened it slowly, reading the first few words. Slowly, the stress from the day started to leave her. The words on the page helped her forget everything. She felt a peaceful calm inside. Reading brought her joy again. It was a wonderful escape after a busy day.
segments.subtitle:
After a very long and busy day, Sarah felt so tired. Her mind was full of many tasks, and she needed to rest. She walked to her favorite chair by the window. The room was quiet and warm. Sarah picked up her special book. Its cover felt smooth in her hands. She opened it slowly, reading the first few words. Slowly, the stress from the day started to leave her. The words on the page helped her forget everything. She felt a peaceful calm inside. Reading brought her joy again. It was a wonderful escape after a busy day.
Sau một ngày rất dài và bận rộn, Sarah cảm thấy thật mệt mỏi. Đầu óc cô ấy đầy ắp công việc, và cô ấy cần nghỉ ngơi. Cô ấy đi đến chiếc ghế yêu thích của mình bên cửa sổ. Căn phòng yên tĩnh và ấm áp. Sarah cầm cuốn sách đặc biệt của mình lên. Bìa sách thật mịn màng trong tay cô. Cô mở sách từ từ, đọc vài từ đầu tiên. Dần dần, căng thẳng của một ngày bắt đầu rời xa cô. Những dòng chữ trên trang sách giúp cô quên đi mọi thứ. Cô cảm thấy một sự bình yên tĩnh lặng bên trong. Đọc sách mang lại niềm vui cho cô một lần nữa. Đó là một lối thoát tuyệt vời sau một ngày bận rộn.
segments.textPrompt: Vibrant 2D digital anime webtoon vector illustration style, clean line art, warm soft lighting, expressive characters, rich atmospheric details, aesthetic 2D artwork (NO text, NO labels, NO typography in image). Hero illustration scene expressing the main story theme: A heartwarming 2D anime illustration showing a young woman finding peace after a long day. She is sitting comfortably in a soft, plush armchair by a large window. Outside, the evening sky transitions from a soft orange to a calm purple hue. She holds an open, well-loved book in her hands, her eyes gently focused on the pages, a subtle, peaceful smile on her face. A small, steaming cup of herbal tea rests on a side table next to her, casting a soft glow from a nearby small lamp. The overall atmosphere is warm, quiet, and inviting, emphasizing tranquility and mental escape. Clean line art and rich, soft lighting details.. This is a top-banner hero illustration for a reading practice story video. It must visually summarize and capture the entire theme, mood, and main characters of the story in a single rich composite scene. It sits in the upper hero area of the page. Keep composition centered and aesthetically balanced. Format: aspect ratio 9:16.
